title: Martin Marietta Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: RALEIGH, N.C., May 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.66 per share on the Company's outstanding common stock. This dividend, which represents a cash dividend of $2.64 per share on an annualized basis, is payable June 30, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 1, 2023.

title: Martin Marietta (MLM) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Martin Marietta (MLM) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.16 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.99 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.39 per share a year ago.

title: Martin Marietta Reports First-Quarter 2023 Results
text: Achieved First-Quarter Records for Revenues, Profitability and Unit Margins Aggregates Gross Profit Per Ton of $5.70 Forecasting $1.9 Billion of 2023 Adjusted EBITDA Consistent with the High End of Guidance Range RALEIGH, N.C., May 04, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”), a leading national supplier of aggregates and heavy building materials, today reported results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2023.
